author: yJader
body:
`already_submitted` is only used here to distinguish the orchestrator submission path (`submit_update` vs `submit_initial`). For diffusion, both paths eventually enter the same diffusion client API and then `DiffusionEngine.step/step_streaming -> add_request`, so DiffusionEngine does not attach different semantics to initial vs update submissions.

Since diffusion `StagePool` rejects list prompts in both `submit_initial` and `submit_update`, singleton-list normalization should not depend on `already_submitted`. Applying it consistently makes the diffusion payload contract clearer and avoids the initial path still passing a list-shaped payload.
